evidence.description: Agent stdout/stderr logs are streamed raw via SSE without any redaction or masking for API keys, tokens, or PII.

results.remediation: Implement a regex-based redaction filter in the LogStreamer class to mask sensitive patterns before streaming and storage.

evidence.description: System implements a high-fidelity audit trail via EventWriter, capturing all canonical state transitions in a structured JSONL format.

results.remediation: Extend audit logging to include read access to sensitive artifacts.

evidence.description: Core activity logs and agent run logs are handled as structured JSON/Pydantic models.

results.remediation: None required for core artifacts; optional for system-level uvicorn logs.

evidence.description: No integration with alerting platforms (Sentry, Slack, Webhooks) for critical errors or security events.

results.remediation: Integrate a central alerting service to notify operators of integrity failures or system crashes.

evidence.description: Lack of correlation ID middleware to trace requests across the asynchronous API and agent subprocess boundaries.

results.remediation: Add correlation ID middleware to FastAPI and propagate the ID to all downstream logging calls.
